description: AST patterns for config-deployment. ast-grep adds limited value here vs ripgrep because most config is YAML / Dockerfile / HCL where text-matching is already adequate. Kept minimal.
notes: Most config-deployment audit value comes from ripgrep + skill investigation. ast-grep adds AST awareness where the same syntax can be ambiguous in code (e.g. JS config files).

patterns.description: Express CORS middleware with wildcard origin
patterns.false_positive_notes: Sometimes intentional for public APIs; concern when credentials are also enabled.

patterns.description: Express CORS middleware with wildcard origin (TS)
DEBUG flag set to True at module level
patterns.false_positive_notes: Concern only if file is loaded in production.
